title: ArmsLib
description: A library that executes custom integration code for optional mods when bullets are fired. This mod is primarily intended for integration with TaCZ.
body:
ArmsLib is a library mod which adds shared common code that mumu17's mods use, this mod provides nothing of value without another mod activating it or using it.

This mod is primarily intended for integration with TaCZ.

**Main Features**
*   Adjust the damage of TaCZ bullets
*   Execute custom integration code for optional mods when bullets are fired
*   Extend the reference to bullets in the inventory
